Food or liquid Stop this many hours before arrival
Solid foods (includes soup) {{NPO_SOLID}} hours
Formula or milk feedings (bottle or tube) {{NPO_FORMULA}} hours
Breast milk {{NPO_BREASTMILK}} hours
Clear liquids (water, juice without pulp, clear soda, clear tea, black coffee) {{NPO_CLEAR}} hours
Thickening agents added to any liquid above {{NPO_THICKENER}} hours
